backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend that wires together access control, blob storage, user approval, Stripe/UPI payment handling, and student CRUD operations with admin-only guards.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to their associated frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs for build/verification tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing recent changes and responsibilities for pages, layouts, hooks, and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with favicon, viewport meta, and a root div that loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Query, TanStack Router, a global Toaster, and a top-level ErrorBoundary with a reload fallback.
frontend/src/components/BackendUnavailab: Full-screen component that shows a loading spinner while the initial health check is pending, or a 'Backend Unavailable' error with a retry button once the check definitively fails.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple reusable animated spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and optional className.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Popover notification bell component that filters and displays per-student notifications from localStorage, supporting mark-as-read and mark-all-read actions.
frontend/src/components/OfflineBanner.ts: Renders an amber banner with a WiFi-off icon when the user is offline; returns null when online.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptModal.tsx: Displays a payment receipt in a dialog modal, showing payment details, status banner, and access code if available.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A colored stat card component that displays a title, numeric value, icon, and optional subtitle with four color theme options.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a styled pill badge for a given payment/session status (pending, approved, rejected, etc.) with appropriate colors.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A link button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat to a hardcoded phone number with a configurable message and label.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Re-exports attendance query hooks and provides a convenience wrapper that converts a principal string to a Principal object for fetching student attendance.
frontend/src/hooks/useCanisterHealth.ts: Polls the ICP canister every 30 seconds via a health check call, tracking online/offline state, pending status, and offline-to-online transition.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useMaterials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting student materials via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, approvals, payments, students, sessions, and attendance.
Shows a success toast and invalidates all React Query caches when the canister backend transitions from offline back to online.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching sessions for a student, adding a new session, and deleting a session via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark mode design tokens for the MathTutor Pro theme.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin portal layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, logout handling, and a backend health check that shows a BackendUnavailableScreen when offline.
frontend/src/layouts/RootLayout.tsx: Root layout component that initializes the localStorage store on mount and renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/StudentLayout.tsx: Student portal layout with a collapsible sidebar, logout handling, and an offline banner displayed when the canister health check returns offline.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Provides localStorage-based helpers for storing, retrieving, and clearing auth state and cached student credentials, including credential validation for offline login.
frontend/src/lib/store.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and localStorage-based CRUD helpers for the app's local data store covering courses, students, payments, sessions, materials, and notifications.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for merging Tailwind class names and formatting currency, dates, and datetimes for the Indian locale.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AttendanceManag: Admin page for marking and viewing student attendance, fetching approved students from the backend and using local store session data due to Principal-based backend limitations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Courses.tsx: Admin page for managing course offerings, allowing admins to add, edit, toggle active status, and delete courses via a modal form and card grid UI.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying summary stats (total students, active, pending, payments) and a recent students list fetched from backend queries.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentMa: Admin page for assigning and deleting study materials for individual students, with student search/selection and a form to add material links and metadata.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageStudentSe: Admin page for scheduling and deleting tutoring sessions for individual students, with student search/selection and a form to input session date, time, meet link, and topic.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Materials.tsx: Legacy admin materials page that manages study material assignments using localStorage as the data store, with student selection sourced from backend payments and local storage.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Notifications.t: Admin page for creating and deleting notifications, supporting broadcast to all approved students or targeted delivery to a specific student, with form state stored via a local store utility.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Payments.tsx: Admin page for viewing, filtering, approving, and rejecting UPI payment requests, using React Query hooks and displaying payment details in dialogs with error handling for canister unavailability.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Sessions.tsx: Admin page for managing tutoring sessions, allowing admins to add new sessions with details like date, time, and meet link, and delete existing ones, with data persisted via a local store.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx: Admin page for listing, searching, viewing, and editing student records fetched via React Query, with modals for detailed view and inline editing of student fields including payment status display.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public-facing landing page for 'Rajat's Equation' tutoring service, displaying a navbar, hero section, active courses, features, testimonials, and contact info with WhatsApp integration.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page supporting student and admin modes via Internet Identity, storing auth state to localStorage and redirecting to the appropriate dashboard after authentication.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Simple static page shown after a failed payment, offering links to retry payment or return to the student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Post-payment success page that finds the student's most recent pending payment, adds a notification, and displays next-steps instructions for admin approval.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Multi-step registration flow (personal info → course selection → UPI payment → success) that submits a UPI payment record and registers the student via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/student/Book.tsx: Student-facing booking page that lets students select a course and session type, calculates total cost, displays UPI payment details with QR code, and submits a pending payment record to the local store.
frontend/src/pages/student/Courses.tsx: Displays a student's enrolled course with payment status badges and a static catalog of available courses they can browse. Uses enrollment data from a custom query hook and renders loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx: Student dashboard showing a welcome banner, enrollment status card, and upcoming sessions list fetched via query hooks. Handles loading skeletons and error states for both enrollment and session data.
frontend/src/pages/student/Materials.tsx: Shows study materials filtered by the logged-in student's ID from the local store, grouped by course, with links to view files. Displays an offline indicator when the canister is unreachable.
frontend/src/pages/student/MyMaterials.t: Similar to Materials.tsx, renders a flat list of study materials assigned to the current student from the local store. Shows an offline badge and an empty state prompting admin upload.
frontend/src/pages/student/MySessions.ts: Lists all tutoring sessions for the current student sorted by date, distinguishing upcoming from past sessions with badges and a join button for sessions with a meet link.
frontend/src/pages/student/Payments.tsx: Displays the student's payment history from the local store with summary stats (total spent, approved, pending counts) and a list of individual payments with status icons and a receipt modal.
frontend/src/pages/student/Profile.tsx: Student profile page that displays personal info (name, email, phone, course, access codes) by reading from the local store and auth state, with an offline indicator when the canister is unreachable.
frontend/src/pages/student/Sessions.tsx: Student sessions page that fetches and displays upcoming and past tutoring sessions for the logged-in student, with loading skeletons, error handling, and a join-meeting button for sessions with a meet link.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree for the app, including public routes, role-guarded admin and student routes, and payment result pages, with auth checks via localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based URLs, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the address bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, registers typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and extends the theme with OKLCH CSS-variable-based design tokens, custom brand colors (navy, gold), and accordion keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state including summary, existing features, known issues, and new feature requests for an educational platform's admin dashboard enhancements. Describes four main features: viewing/editing students, and managing student-specific sessions and materials.
